title: FoodNest
description: A smart food discovery platform to discover food, not just locations.
longDescription: Find the perfect cafe or restaurant near you in seconds. Smart filters, mood-based discovery (Chill Cafe, Date Night, etc.), and curated top picks tailored just for you.
highlights: Curated top picks and trending nearby spots

title: AlgoForge-2.0
description: Advanced algorithm visualizer and learning platform.
longDescription: Helping developers understand complex Data Structures and Algorithms concepts through visual interaction and step-by-step execution.

title: ViTravelBuddy
description: AI-powered travel companion for seamless journey planning.
longDescription: An AI-powered application focused on seamless travel planning, integrating UX with powerful real-time planning capabilities.
highlights: AI integration for automated itinerary generation

title: LevelUp-
description: Gamified platform for skill development and personal growth.
longDescription: A platform focused on motivation through gamification and progress tracking for users wanting to develop new skills.

title: MindCare
description: A supportive platform for student mental well-being.
longDescription: Built during the Smart India Hackathon to solve real-world student stressors and provide a supportive platform for mental health.
highlights: Developed under pressure during Smart India Hackathon
Targeted at real-world student mental health stressors
